ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Original on page 1, Copy on pages 2-3. All text legible.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 19 pages. FlexLink branded invoice. All text legible.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The references '1001146366' and 'C024.10268-1' in box 5 are order/project references, not LC references.

locations_found: Invoice footer on every page: 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice header branding: 'FLEXLINK' logo on every page
consignor_search_step2b.notes: The certificate consignor 'Flexlink AB' is found in the invoice footer on all 19 pages as 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'. The invoice is issued by FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd (Malaysia) but the footer identifies FlexLink AB (Sweden) with matching address.

pairing_validation.motivation: Invoice number 1001146366 matches certificate remarks. Consignor FlexLink AB found in invoice footer. Consignee Mondelez Kinh Do Vietnam found in Shipping Address.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Flexlink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, SE 415 50, Göteborg, Sweden
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden (invoice footer on all pages)

comparison_steps.description: Corporate structure check – search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Flexlink AB' found in invoice footer on all 19 pages as 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'. The name matches exactly after case normalization. The invoice is issued by FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd (Malaysia) but FlexLink AB (Sweden) is explicitly identified in the footer with matching address and country.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure – consignor name found in invoice footer/identification block
Country verification via explicit address in footer: Sweden

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Flexlink AB' in Sweden. The invoice's Invoice Address field shows 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' in Malaysia, which is a different legal entity. However, per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name was searched across ALL invoice pages. 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden' appears in the footer of every invoice page. After normalization (case), 'Flexlink AB' matches 'FlexLink AB'. Country: certificate says Sweden, footer says Sweden. Address: certificate 'Byfogdegatan 11, SE 415 50, Göteborg' matches footer 'Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg' (Göteborg = Gothenburg in Swedish/English). MATCH via 4.1.0.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice issuer is FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd (Malaysia), not Flexlink AB (Sweden)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.1.0 allows consignor to be identified anywhere in the invoice documents, including footer. FlexLink AB with matching address and country is explicitly present in the footer.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Flexlink AB' med adress i Göteborg, Sverige, identifierades i fakturans sidfot på samtliga sidor som 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'. Företagsnamn och land överensstämmer efter normalisering. MATCH via regel 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur).

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY, 26 VSIP ROAD NO. 8, VIETNAM-SINGAPORE INDUSTRIAL PARK, BINH HOA WARD, THUAN AN CITY, BINH DUONG PROVINCE, VIETNAM
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC, 26 VSIP ST. NO.8, VIETNAM-SINGAPORE INDUSTRIAL PARK, BINH HOA WARD, 59000 THUAN AN CITY, BINH DUONG PROVINCE (Shipping Address)

comparison_steps.result: Invoice Address is FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD (Malaysia). Shipping Address is MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC (Vietnam). The Invoice Address field is the primary billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Ship-To rule – certificate issued for end recipient
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignee 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY' is identified exactly in the Shipping Address as 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC'. 'JSC' is a standard abbreviation for 'Joint Stock Company' (rule 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee). Invoice Address shows FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd (billing party). Both parties appear in the same invoice, confirming the same supply chain. Country: Vietnam matches.

rules_applied.description: Ship-To rule – certificate issued for end recipient. Consignee found in Ship-To field while Bill-To shows different party.
Country check: Vietnam in certificate matches Vietnam in shipping address

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY'. Invoice primary billing field (Invoice Address): 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' in Malaysia – this is a different party. However, the invoice Shipping Address shows 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC' at '26 VSIP ST. NO.8, VIETNAM-SINGAPORE INDUSTRIAL PARK'. Per rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To rule): (1) Certificate consignee matches Shipping Address after normalizing 'Joint Stock Company' → 'JSC' per 4.1.3.6; (2) Invoice Address is a different party (FlexLink Engineering, a distribution/sales entity); (3) Both parties appear in the same invoice; (4) Nothing contradicts the consignee being the actual goods recipient. All conditions met → MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because Invoice Address (primary billing field) is FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd, not Mondelez
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To rule) explicitly allows the certificate consignee to match the Ship-To party when the Bill-To is a different trading entity, as COO certificates follow goods flow, not payment flow.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY' identifierades i fakturans leveransadress som 'MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC'. 'JSC' är en vedertagen förkortning för 'Joint Stock Company'. Land (Vietnam) överensstämmer. MATCH via Ship-To-regeln (4.2.0.3).

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: CONVEYOR PARTS with article numbers: XBTP 5A85, XCAN 8, XCBE 64, XCBL 3X44X88, XCBL 3X88, XCBL LX64, XCFF 64X210, XCFF 88X260, XHBH 90R170 A, XHBV 90R400, XHCB 3, XHCB L, XHCC 160 A
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: CONVEYOR PARTS (project header) with matching article numbers: XBTP 5A85, XCAN 8, XCBE 64, XCBL 3X44X88, XCBL 3X88, XCBL LX64, XCFF 64X210, XCFF 88X260, XHBH 90R170 A, XHBV 90R400, XHCB 3, XHCB L, XHCC 160 A

comparison_steps.details: Certificate lists article numbers with descriptions. Each article number in the certificate can be identified in the invoice. Verification of key articles: XBTP 5A85 Plain chain → found in invoice items 510/520/530/540; XCAN 8 T-slot nut → found in item 550; XCBE 64 End cap → found in item 560; XCBL 3X44X88 → found in item 570; XCBL 3X88 → found in item 580; XCBL LX64 → found in items 590-630; XCFF 64X210 → found in item 640; XCFF 88X260 → found in item 650; XHBH 90R170 A → found in item 660; XHBV 90R400 → found in item 670; XHCB 3 → found in item 680; XHCB L → found in items 690-740; XHCC 160 A → found in item 750. Note: Invoice items 530/540 show 'XBTP 5A85 K' while certificate shows 'XBTP 5A85'. The 'K' suffix is an additional variant indicator. The certificate article 'XBTP 5A85' is a prefix of the invoice article 'XBTP 5A85 K'. However, items 510/520 show exact 'XBTP 5A85' matching the certificate exactly. All product descriptions also match (Plain chain, T-slot nut, End cap, Support beam, Foot, Wheel bend, Vertical bend, Conveyor beam, Beam section for chain installation). The general header 'CONVEYOR PARTS' matches the invoice project name 'PROJECT#NAME:C024.10268-Mondelez-Conveyor system'.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article number matching. All article numbers in certificate found exactly in invoice.

Non-identity-bearing additions. Invoice contains additional items not in certificate (BRB 8.4X16, M6S 8X16, XBBH, XBBP, XBBV, XBCR, FLXC, XBEJ, XHCS, XHEJ, XHTP, XLAG, XLAN, XLAT, XLCR, XMCS, XSCJ, 5056127, 5110566) – per rule 2.1 (unilateral verification), additional items in invoice do not cause MISMATCH.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: The certificate lists 'CONVEYOR PARTS' as the general description and then specific article lines. Using Priority 1 (article number matching), each article number in the certificate was searched in the invoice. All 13 unique article numbers from the certificate (XBTP 5A85, XCAN 8, XCBE 64, XCBL 3X44X88, XCBL 3X88, XCBL LX64, XCFF 64X210, XCFF 88X260, XHBH 90R170 A, XHBV 90R400, XHCB 3, XHCB L, XHCC 160 A) were found in the invoice with matching descriptions. The invoice contains many additional items not listed in the certificate, but per rule 2.1, the verification is unilateral – we only check that certificate items exist in the invoice, not vice versa. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice contains many more items than certificate
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 2.1 establishes unilateral verification: only items in the certificate need to be found in the invoice. Additional items in the invoice do not cause MISMATCH.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Samtliga artikelnummer i certifikatet (XBTP 5A85, XCAN 8, XCBE 64, XCBL 3X44X88, XCBL 3X88, XCBL LX64, XCFF 64X210, XCFF 88X260, XHBH 90R170 A, XHBV 90R400, XHCB 3, XHCB L, XHCC 160 A) med tillhörande beskrivningar kan identifieras i fakturan. Övergripande varubeskrivning 'CONVEYOR PARTS' överensstämmer med fakturans projektnamn. MATCH via prioritet 1 (artikelnummermatchning).

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Multiple quantities per article line, e.g. XBTP 5A85 Plain chain: 4 PCS, 11 PCS, 52 PCS, 9 PCS; XCAN 8: 30 PCS; XCBE 64: 20 PCS; XCBL 3X44X88: 2 PCS; XCBL 3X88: 4 PCS; XCBL LX64: 1599 MM, 715 MM, 2832 MM, 1506 MM, 716 MM; XCFF 64X210: 11 PCS; XCFF 88X260: 4 PCS; XHBH 90R170 A: 9 PCS; XHBV 90R400: 6 PCS; XHCB 3: 1 PCE; XHCB L: 2408 MM, 1500 MM, 960 MM, 1110 MM, 200 MM, 1268 MM; XHCC 160 A: 3 PCS
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Matching quantities found per invoice line item

comparison_steps.description: Occurrence check – verify certificate quantities in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Each quantity in the certificate was checked against the corresponding invoice line: XBTP 5A85: 4 PCS → item 510 (4 PC) ✓; 11 PCS → item 520 (11 PC) ✓; 52 PCS → item 530 (52 PC) ✓; 9 PCS → item 540 (9 PC) ✓. XCAN 8: 30 PCS → item 550 (30 PC) ✓. XCBE 64: 20 PCS → item 560 (20 PC) ✓. XCBL 3X44X88: 2 PCS → item 570 (2 PC) ✓. XCBL 3X88: 4 PCS → item 580 (4 PC) ✓. XCBL LX64: 1599 MM → item 590 (1.599 MM after thousands separator normalization) ✓; 715 MM → item 600 (715 MM) ✓; 2832 MM → item 610 (2.832 MM) ✓; 1506 MM → item 620 (1.506 MM) ✓; 716 MM → item 630 (716 MM) ✓. XCFF 64X210: 11 PCS → item 640 (11 PC) ✓. XCFF 88X260: 4 PCS → item 650 (4 PC) ✓. XHBH 90R170 A: 9 PCS → item 660 (9 PC) ✓. XHBV 90R400: 6 PCS → item 670 (6 PC) ✓. XHCB 3: 1 PCE → item 680 (1 PC) ✓. XHCB L: 2408 MM → item 690 (2.408 MM) ✓; 1500 MM → item 700 (1.500 MM) ✓; 960 MM → item 710 (960 MM) ✓; 1110 MM → item 720 (1.110 MM) ✓; 200 MM → item 730 (200 MM) ✓; 1268 MM → item 740 (1.268 MM) ✓. XHCC 160 A: 3 PCS → item 750 (3 PC) ✓. All quantities verified.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – all numeric values from certificate identified in invoice
Thousands separator normalization – invoice uses period as thousands separator (e.g. 1.599 = 1599, 2.832 = 2832)

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate quantities are listed per article line in box 7. Each quantity was checked against the invoice. The invoice uses periods as thousands separators for MM quantities (e.g. '1.599 MM' = 1599 MM, '2.832 MM' = 2832 MM). After normalization per rule 4.4.3.3, all values match exactly. Units: certificate uses PCS/PCE/MM, invoice uses PC/MM – these are equivalent abbreviations. All 25 quantity lines in the certificate were verified against the invoice. MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Samtliga kvantiteter i certifikatet kunde identifieras i fakturan. Tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering (4.4.3.3) tillämpades för MM-värden där fakturan använder punkt som tusentalsavskiljare. Alla numeriska värden och enheter överensstämmer. MATCH.

checkpoint_results.invoice_value: CoO per item: Sweden, Taiwan, Poland, China, Germany, Czech Republic

comparison_steps.result: All five origin countries from certificate found in invoice CoO fields

comparison_steps.description: Check for non-certificate origins in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains 'Czech Republic' (item 790 XHEJ 325) which is NOT listed in certificate's origin field. However, this item is NOT listed in the certificate's goods description – the certificate does not include article XHEJ 325. Per rule 2.1 (unilateral verification), the system only verifies that certificate origins can be found in the invoice, not that all invoice origins are in the certificate. The Czech Republic origin pertains to an item not covered by this certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Positive verification of each certificate origin
comparison_steps.result: Sweden → found in invoice CoO fields (items 10, 60, 70, 80, 470, 480, 490, 560, 570, 580, 590-630, 670, 680, 690-740, 760, 770, 780, 800, 820). Taiwan → found (items 20, 830). Poland → found (items 30, 40, 50, 90-460, 500, 510-540, 550 is China but 510-540 are Poland, 660, 750, 880, 890). China → found (items 550, 640, 650, 850, 860, 870). Germany → found (items 810, 840). All five verified.

rules_applied.description: Origin countries identified via 'CoO:' fields per invoice line item
Positive verification – each origin in certificate expressly identified in invoice
Unilateral verification – Czech Republic in invoice for item not in certificate does not cause MISMATCH

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate lists five origin countries: Sweden, Taiwan, Poland, China, Germany. The invoice provides per-item CoO fields. Each of the five countries was found: Sweden (many items), Taiwan (items 20, 830), Poland (many items), China (items 550, 640, 650, 850, 860, 870), Germany (items 810, 840). The invoice also contains Czech Republic for item 790 (XHEJ 325 Idler end unit), but this article is NOT listed in the certificate. Per rule 2.1 (unilateral verification), the system verifies that certificate's stated origins exist in the invoice – not that all invoice origins are in the certificate. Since XHEJ 325 is not a certificate item, its Czech Republic origin is irrelevant to this verification. The certificate's origin field lists the origins applicable to the goods described in its box 6, and the invoice confirms all five. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice contains Czech Republic origin not listed in certificate
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 2.1: verification is unilateral. Czech Republic pertains to item XHEJ 325 which is not listed in the certificate. The certificate only certifies the items in its goods description, and for those items, all listed origins are confirmed in the invoice.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Samtliga fem ursprungsländer i certifikatet (Sweden, Taiwan, Poland, China, Germany) kan identifieras i fakturans CoO-fält per artikelrad. Fakturan innehåller även Czech Republic för en artikel (XHEJ 325) som inte ingår i certifikatet, men detta påverkar inte verifieringen enligt principen om ensidig verifiering (2.1). MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Flexlink AB identifieras i fakturans sidfot, mottagaren Mondelez Kinh Do Vietnam bekräftas via leveransadressen, varubeskrivningar och kvantiteter matchar exakt, och samtliga fem ursprungsländer (Sverige, Taiwan, Polen, Kina, Tyskland) återfinns i fakturans ursprungsangivelser per artikel. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
summary_of_matches: Consignor: FlexLink AB (Sweden) identified in invoice footer via corporate structure rule
Consignee: Mondelez Kinh Do Vietnam JSC identified in Shipping Address via Ship-To rule
Goods: All 13 article numbers and descriptions from certificate found in invoice
Quantity: All 25 quantity lines verified with thousands separator normalization
Origin: All five countries (Sweden, Taiwan, Poland, China, Germany) confirmed in invoice CoO fields

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Flexlink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, SE 415 50, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – avsändarens namn hittades i fakturans sidfot
sections.motivation: Flexlink AB med adress i Sverige identifieras i fakturans sidfot på samtliga sidor. Namn och land matchar efter normalisering.

sections.certificate_value: MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JOINT STOCK COMPANY, Vietnam
sections.invoice_value: MONDELEZ KINH DO VIETNAM JSC, Shipping Address, Vietnam
sections.rule_applied: Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) – certifikat utfärdat för slutmottagare; juridisk bolagsform JSC = Joint Stock Company (4.1.3.6)
sections.motivation: Mottagaren identifierades i fakturans leveransadress. JSC är vedertagen förkortning för Joint Stock Company. Land Vietnam matchar.
Samtliga artikelnummer i certifikatet identifierades exakt i fakturan med matchande produktbeskrivningar.

sections.invoice_value: Matchande kvantiteter per fakturararad i PC/MM
sections.motivation: Samtliga 25 kvantitetsrader i certifikatet verifierades mot fakturan. Tusentalsavskiljare (punkt) normaliserades för MM-värden.

sections.invoice_value: CoO per artikel: Sweden, Taiwan, Poland, China, Germany (+ Czech Republic för ej certifierad artikel)
sections.motivation: Samtliga fem ursprungsländer i certifikatet kan identifieras i fakturans CoO-fält. Czech Republic förekommer för en artikel som inte ingår i certifikatet och påverkar inte bedömningen.
